name: py2rust-cli-services-impl
title: W1: CLI services impl + socket client parity
description: Wave 1 architecture unlock. Scope: (a) fill socket client gaps needed for CLI->daemon RPC (ccb-cli/ccbd.rs client + required socket_server_runtime/client_runtime stubs), (b) implement Phase2Services trait (29 methods) to wire dispatch->handler->render end-to-end. Acceptance: dispatch drives a real command (ccb ps/ping) end-to-end with correct render output.
creator: luck
